Off Calendar Nov-18-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove-Up Desert Immigration V. Orantes Cgc15547317
Off Calendar Oct-17-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-25-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Michael Raifsnider, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Desert Immigration Bonds,
No appearance by defaulted defendants Marcelo Orantes and Pebbles Duran,
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.
Witness: James DeSoto sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.

Plaintiff's Exhibit:
1-Notice of Immigration Bond Cancellation
Court returned exhibit to Plaintiff.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendants as follows:
Damages: $12,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $8040.00
Costs: $700.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $20,740.00

Judgment signed in open court.
